# arclo

> AI-native design system for React. 6 components that don't exist in MUI, Tailwind, Radix, or shadcn/ui.

Built on Radix conventions. Works with shadcn/ui. TypeScript + Tailwind CSS.

## Install

```
npm install @arclo/react
```

Peer dependencies: react >=18, react-dom >=18, tailwindcss >=4

## Components

### StreamingText

Token-by-token text rendering with 6 lifecycle states.

```tsx
import { StreamingText } from "@arclo/react";

<StreamingText.Root stream={readableStream} speed={30} chunkSize="char">
  <StreamingText.Skeleton lines={3} />
  <StreamingText.Content />
  <StreamingText.Cursor char="▋" />
  <StreamingText.Stop>Stop generating</StreamingText.Stop>
  <StreamingText.ErrorFallback message="Something went wrong." onRetry={retry} />
  <StreamingText.RateLimit message="Rate limit reached." retryAfter={30} />
  <StreamingText.Toolbar>{/* buttons here */}</StreamingText.Toolbar>
</StreamingText.Root>
```

States: pending, streaming, done, interrupted, error, ratelimit.

Root props:
- stream: ReadableStream<string> — stream of text chunks
- text: string — plain text alternative (animates in)
- speed: number (default 30) — ms between chunks
- chunkSize: "char" | "word" | "line" (default "char")
- onDone: (text: string) => void
- onError: (error: Error) => void
- onInterrupt: (partialText: string) => void

Hook: `useStreamingText({ stream, text, speed, chunkSize, onDone, onError, onInterrupt })` returns `{ displayedText, fullText, state, interrupt, reset, skipAnimation }`.

Custom rendering: `<StreamingText.Content render={(text) => <Markdown>{text}</Markdown>} />`

### PromptBox

AI prompt input with auto-growing textarea, context chips, and suggestions.

```tsx
import { PromptBox } from "@arclo/react";

<PromptBox.Root onSubmit={(value) => sendToAI(value)} isSubmitting={loading}>
  <PromptBox.Chips>
    <PromptBox.Chip onRemove={() => remove()}>GPT-4</PromptBox.Chip>
  </PromptBox.Chips>
  <PromptBox.Input placeholder="Ask anything..." minRows={1} maxRows={8} />
  <PromptBox.Suggestions
    suggestions={["Summarize this", "What are the risks?"]}
    onSelect={(s) => console.log(s)}
  />
  <PromptBox.Footer>
    <PromptBox.SubmitButton />
  </PromptBox.Footer>
</PromptBox.Root>
```

Root props:
- value: string (controlled)
- defaultValue: string
- onSubmit: (value: string) => void
- onValueChange: (value: string) => void
- isSubmitting: boolean
- disabled: boolean

Enter submits. Shift+Enter adds newline. Textarea auto-grows from minRows to maxRows.

### ConfidenceBadge

Visual indicator for AI confidence levels.

```tsx
import { ConfidenceBadge } from "@arclo/react";

<ConfidenceBadge level="high" />           // green badge
<ConfidenceBadge level="medium" />         // amber badge
<ConfidenceBadge level="low" />            // red badge
<ConfidenceBadge level="unknown" />        // gray badge
<ConfidenceBadge level="high" variant="dot" />     // small dot
<ConfidenceBadge level="low" variant="inline" />   // italic text
<ConfidenceBadge level="high" label="Verified" />  // custom label
```

Props:
- level: "high" | "medium" | "low" | "unknown" (required)
- variant: "badge" | "dot" | "inline" (default "badge")
- label: string (overrides default label)

### FeedbackBar

Response action toolbar — thumbs, copy, regenerate.

```tsx
import { FeedbackBar } from "@arclo/react";

<FeedbackBar.Root onFeedback={(value) => track(value)}>
  <FeedbackBar.ThumbsUp />
  <FeedbackBar.ThumbsDown />
  <FeedbackBar.Copy text={responseText} />
  <FeedbackBar.Regenerate onRegenerate={() => regen()} />
</FeedbackBar.Root>
```

Root props:
- onFeedback: (value: "up" | "down" | null) => void

Feedback toggles — clicking active thumb deselects. Copy shows checkmark for 2s.

### CitationInline

Inline source attribution with hover preview.

```tsx
import { CitationInline, CitationGroup } from "@arclo/react";

// Superscript (default)
<CitationInline index={1} href="https://example.com" sourceTitle="Source" preview="Preview text..." />

// Bracket style
<CitationInline index={2} variant="bracket" />

// Pill style
<CitationInline index={3} variant="pill" />

// Group multiple citations
<CitationGroup>
  <CitationInline index={1} />
  <CitationInline index={2} />
</CitationGroup>
```

Props:
- index: number (required)
- href: string — link URL
- sourceTitle: string — shown in preview tooltip
- preview: ReactNode — hover preview content
- variant: "superscript" | "bracket" | "pill" (default "superscript")

### RefusalCard

Graceful declined request handling with alternatives.

```tsx
import { RefusalCard } from "@arclo/react";

<RefusalCard
  type="safety"
  reason="I can't help with that."
  suggestions={["Try this instead", "Or ask about this"]}
  onSuggestionClick={(s) => submitPrompt(s)}
/>
```

Types: safety (red), capability (amber), policy (orange), context (blue).

Props:
- type: "safety" | "capability" | "policy" | "context" (default "capability")
- reason: string (has default per type)
- suggestions: string[]
- onSuggestionClick: (suggestion: string) => void
- icon: ReactNode (override default icon)

Accepts children for custom content inside the card.

## Architecture

All compound components follow Radix patterns:
- Root provides context via React Context
- Child parts consume context and render conditionally based on state
- All parts accept className for Tailwind customization
- All parts forward refs
- data-state attributes on Root for CSS targeting

## Links

- Docs: https://arclo.dev/docs
- GitHub: https://github.com/metaleap/arclo
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@arclo/react
